title: For Immediate Release
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The legislation signed by Governor Newsom expands 'earn and learn' opportunities for jobseekers who face barriers to employment.",
    "SB 779 includes employment social enterprises (ESEs) and worker cooperatives as eligible for 'earn and learn' funding consideration in California.",
    "ESEs provide evidence-based job and life skills training to individuals with barriers to employment.",
    "Offering skills training and employment together is one of the best ways to enable successful returns to the workforce.",
    "Nearly 80% of ESE employees are justice-impacted and 68% are Black or Latinx.",
    "The Future of Work Commission's recommendations call for the creation of an inclusive and equitable economy by 2030.",
    "Independent research verifies that the on-the-job experience provided by ESEs more than doubles job retention and significantly increases wages and total incomes.",
    "There is a growing need to address the pandemic's effects on workforce structures at the federal and state levels.",
    "New models prioritizing employment for individuals overcoming barriers to work recognize emerging models within the gig economy."
  ]
}
```
